summary: Iteration 5 testing: Player Theme Settings (GET/PATCH), Multi-user support (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/users, viewer role enforcement), PlayLab Bulk Import (POST /api/playlab/import). All 33 backend tests passed. All major frontend flows verified. One MEDIUM UI bug found: admin seed user (StreamHost) shows incorrectly as 'Inactive' + 'Viewer' in the Users tab due to missing role/is_active fields in legacy MongoDB document.

minor.issue: Admin seed user 'StreamHost' is missing 'role' and 'is_active' fields in MongoDB. initialize_admin_user() only creates new users — never updates existing ones with new fields. Raw document returned from GET /api/users lacks these fields for legacy admin. Authentication still works (User model defaults apply at token validation), but the raw listing is missing these fields.

ui_bugs.issue: StreamHost admin user card displays 'Inactive' badge and 'Viewer — Watch & embed' with Eye icon instead of 'Admin' + Shield icon. Root cause: MongoDB document for StreamHost lacks 'role' and 'is_active' fields (legacy pre-multi-user record). UI renders user.role === 'admin' as false → Eye icon shown; !user.is_active → Inactive badge shown. Does not affect auth/permissions — only the display in Settings > Users.

passed_tests: GET /api/settings/player returns expected fields (primary_color, background_color, show_controls, autoplay, loop)
PATCH /api/settings/player saves colors and toggles
PATCH /api/settings/player persists — subsequent GET returns updated values
Viewer can read GET /api/settings/player (get_current_user)
Viewer cannot PATCH /api/settings/player (require_admin → 403)
POST /api/auth/login with testviewer/Viewer123! returns role=viewer
POST /api/auth/login with StreamHost/TestPass123!@# returns role=admin
GET /api/users returns list of users (admin, no passwords exposed)
POST /api/users creates viewer user with correct fields
PATCH /api/users/{id}?role=admin changes role — verified via GET
PATCH /api/users/{id}?is_active=false deactivates user — verified via GET
DELETE /api/users/{id} removes user — verified via GET returns absence
Admin cannot delete own account (400)
Admin cannot deactivate own account (400)
Invalid role 'superuser' rejected (400)
Duplicate username rejected (400)
Viewer cannot GET /api/users (403)
Viewer cannot POST /api/upload/init (403)
Viewer cannot DELETE /api/videos/{id} (403)
Viewer can GET /api/videos (200)
Admin can still GET /api/users (200)
POST /api/playlab/import with empty array returns 400
POST /api/playlab/import with valid JSON array creates external video records (imported=2)
Imported videos appear in GET /api/videos with processing_status=external
Import response contains id, title, hls_url for each video
Viewer cannot POST /api/playlab/import (403)
POST /api/playlab/import with >200 items returns 400
Regression: GET /api/health returns healthy
Regression: GET /api/videos authenticated works
Regression: GET /api/videos unauthenticated returns 403
Regression: GET /api/folders works
Regression: GET /api/playlab/settings works with api_key + webhook_url fields
Frontend: Settings page loads with Player Theme tab and Users tab
Frontend: Player Theme tab has color pickers (primary + bg), 3 toggles, Save Player Settings button, live preview
Frontend: Save Player Settings shows 'Player settings saved' toast
Frontend: Users tab shows user list (StreamHost, testviewer) with New User button
Frontend: Create User dialog opens with username, password, role, submit fields
Frontend: Creating user 'TEST_ui_viewer_iter5' shows success toast and appears in list
Frontend: PlayLab Integration page loads with API & Sync tab and Bulk Import tab
Frontend: Bulk Import tab has JSON textarea and Import Videos button
Frontend: Importing a video shows success result with title and 'Imported 1 video(s)' toast
Frontend: Viewer login shows 'testviewer' + 'Viewer' badge in sidebar
Frontend: Viewer only sees 'Video Library' nav item (Upload, Folders, Mesh, PlayLab, Settings hidden)
Frontend: Viewer sees only Embed button (no Edit/Delete) on video cards
Frontend: /upload redirect to / for viewer — protected routes working
Frontend: EmbedSettingsDialog has 'Embed Code' tab with inline code + Copy button
Frontend: EmbedSettingsDialog has 'Player Settings' tab with color picker, toggles, domain restriction, save button
action_items: MEDIUM: Fix initialize_admin_user() in server.py to update existing admin user document with missing 'role' and 'is_active' fields (e.g., use upsert with $setOnInsert for new fields, or add a migration that sets defaults for all users missing these fields). Fix: await db.users.update_many({'role': {'$exists': False}}, {'$set': {'role': 'admin', 'is_active': True}})

MEDIUM: The above DB migration will also fix the UI bug in Settings > Users where StreamHost appears as 'Inactive' + 'Viewer'. No frontend code change needed — just ensure MongoDB document has role and is_active.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: initialize_admin_user() only creates user if not existing — doesn't add new fields (role, is_active) to legacy admin document. A one-time migration or $setOnInsert pattern is needed.
routes/users.py: GET /api/users returns raw MongoDB document — missing fields for legacy users. Should either apply User model defaults before returning, or ensure DB always has required fields.

EmbedSettingsDialog.jsx: save() for hasExisting=true makes TWO PATCH calls (lines 67-88). The first PATCH uses json body with params object (no allowed_domains), the second uses URLSearchParams (with allowed_domains + other fields). This is redundant — only the second call is needed. The first call does nothing useful but adds an extra HTTP round trip.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass; one UI display bug on admin user card in Users tab)

seed_data_creation: TEST_vieweruser_iter5 and TEST_ui_viewer_iter5 users created and deleted. UI_Test_Import_Video imported and deleted. TEST_Import_Video_1/2 and TEST_Import_Check_Title imported and deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 tested: Player Theme Settings (GET/PATCH), Multi-user CRUD, viewer role enforcement, PlayLab Bulk Import. All backend tests pass. Only bug: StreamHost admin user missing role/is_active in MongoDB — fix is a one-time DB migration in server.py. Test files: test_iteration5_features.py. Previous test files: test_iteration4_features.py, test_chunked_upload.py, test_mesh_playlab.py. Admin pw: TestPass123!@#. Viewer: testviewer/Viewer123!. EmbedSettingsDialog redundant double PATCH issue is a code quality note, not a blocking bug.

admin_user_missing_role_is_active.bug: StreamHost user card in Settings > Users shows 'Inactive' badge and 'Viewer' role/icon
admin_user_missing_role_is_active.root_cause: The StreamHost admin user DB document was created in a previous iteration before 'role' and 'is_active' fields were added to the User model. The initialize_admin_user() function in server.py checks if user exists and returns early without updating — it never backfills missing fields for existing documents.
admin_user_missing_role_is_active.reproduction: 1. Login as admin → Settings → Users tab → See StreamHost showing 'Inactive' + 'Viewer — Watch & embed'
admin_user_missing_role_is_active.mitigation: In server.py initialize_admin_user(), after finding existing user, check for missing fields and update: await db.users.update_one({'username': 'StreamHost', 'role': {'$exists': False}}, {'$set': {'role': 'admin', 'is_active': True}})
admin_user_missing_role_is_active.impact: Cosmetic only — does not affect authentication or access control. JWT token validation uses User model defaults.
